acceptance_criteria.text: Public sales room shows the current proposal as an editable document-like block.
proof: PublicSalesRoomPage renders versioned selectable proposal text.

acceptance_criteria.text: Visitors can submit replacement suggestions or comments for selected proposal text.
proof: Frontend posts suggestions; backend validates and stores pending suggestions.
gaps: Production write flow not executed against real room data.

acceptance_criteria.text: Pending suggestions can be accepted or rejected and accepted replacements create a new version.
proof: Resolve endpoint updates suggestion status and creates a proposal version on accepted replacement.
gaps: Production write flow not executed against real room data.

acceptance_criteria.text: Review data is persisted in PostgreSQL and exposed from the public room API.
proof: Alembic migration and runtime ensure helper create proposal version/suggestion tables.

acceptance_criteria.text: Chat and file upload remain below the proposal.
proof: Existing composer, upload, and message history remain in the public room page.

known_gaps: Do not exercise accept/reject against production room data without approval because it changes the visible proposal.
